title: BSIDE AVD06 Non-Contact Voltage Detector Electric Power Socket Outlet AC Voltage Tester Pen 12-1000V Auto/Manual Mode Adjustable Sensitivity NCV Live Wire Check with Color LED Indicator and Flashlight
features: [Dual Mode]: This detector has Auto/Manual mode for selection according to your needs. It is convenient to detect and indicate the existence of AC voltage in Auto mode, or applied to more occasions in manual mode.

[Sensitivity is Freely Adjustable]: The sensitivity of the detector is adjusted to any value according to your needs. When adjusting to low sensitivity, it can more accurately distinguish the specific situation in complex lines.

[Smart Voltage Strength Detection]: The detector features 8 LED indicators in 3 colors (2 green, 3 yellow and 3 red). Easy and intuitive to judge the voltage strength by automatically lighting up different color & number of LED indicators and the frequency of the alarm sounds.
[Live Wire Check]: Safe and easy to distinguish the live wire by comparing the strength of the detected voltage, the line that detect the stronger voltage signal is live wire.
[Break Point Locate]: Locate the break point of the live line by measuring the change in voltage strength.
description: What is the development history of voltage detector? Series 1: Contact voltage detector Series 2: Non-contact, sensitivity not adjustable Series 3: Non-contact, sensitivity can only be adjusted to 2 values Series 4: Non-contact, sensitivity can only be adjusted to 3 values Series 5: Non-contact, dual mode (Auto/manual), freely adjustable sensitivity, smart voltage strength detection ▶ Series 1 to 4 are single mode voltage detector, and the series 5 is dual mode voltage detector Why is the dual mode voltage detector better than the single mode voltage detector? - The dual mode voltage detector has Auto/manual mode for selection according to your needs, which can applied to more applications - The single mode voltage detector has only one detection mode, and the application is greatly limited How does our AVD06 voltage detector smart indicate the detected voltage strength? - Our voltage detector has 8 LED indicators in 3 colors. It can smart judge the detected voltage strength by automatically light different color & quantity LED indicators In manual mode: - Low voltage: 12-48V, 2 Green LED indicators light up, slow alarm sounds - Medium voltage: 48-90V, 2 Green & 3 Yellow LED indicators light up, fast alarm sounds - High voltage: 90-1000V, 8 LED indicators light up, much faster alarm sounds In Auto mode: - Low voltage: 48-90V, 2 Green LED indicators light up, slow alarm sounds - Medium voltage: 90-130V, 2 Green & 3 Yellow LED indicators light up, fast alarm sounds - High voltage: 130-1000V, 8 LED indicators light up, much fast alarm sounds Package Includes: 1 * Non-Contact Voltage Tester 1 * User Manual Note: The batteries (1 * 9V 6F22) are not included in the package due to Aviation Security Check
